reviews.comment:
Para combustibles muy buen servicio. El servicio de comestibles un poco pobre.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service for fuel. The grocery service is a bit poor.

reviews.comment:
Buen establecimiento...baños, agua caliente, moderados precios, hamacas para los chicos, lugar para almorzar al aire libre y debtro de la estación.

(Translated by Google)
Good establishment...bathrooms, hot water, moderate prices, hammocks for the kids, place to have lunch outdoors and inside the station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvbkl5Y293RRAB

reviews.comment:

The men's restrooms are devastated, as the photo shows. ACA cannot accept this.

reviews.comment:
Es todo un desastre. Una vergüenza para ser un ACA. No hay agua en ningún lugar de la estación y lógicamente los baños son una mugre

(Translated by Google)
It's a complete disaster. A disgrace for an ACA. There's no water anywhere in the station, and obviously the bathrooms are filthy.

reviews.comment:
Me parece una verguenza una marca Argentina que nos representa a todos en un lugar estratégico camino a corrientes capital, gente de brasil, cerca de posadas, los baños todos sucios, personal no preparado para atender la gente y mantener la limpieza del predio (la gente deberia ayudar) donde la gente hace un descanso de su viaje.....ni hablar que en esta época te cobren el agua 10 pesos para tomar el mate.....

(Translated by Google)
I find it shameful that an Argentine brand that represents us all is in a strategic location on the way to Corrientes, the capital, people from Brazil, near inns, the bathrooms are all dirty, staff is not trained to serve the people and maintain the cleanliness of the premises (people should help) where people take a break from their trip... not to mention that in this time of year they charge you 10 pesos for water to drink mate...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJbmNqaEtREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena estación para detenerse a descansar. Ofrece todos los servicios que debe brindar. Los baños muy limpios.

(Translated by Google)
A great station to stop and rest. It offers all the services you'd expect. The restrooms are very clean.
